sql: CREATE OR ALTER TABLE PUBLIC.ORDERS (id INT)
description: basic table with CREATE OR ALTER

sql: CREATE OR ALTER VIEW PUBLIC.VW_ORDERS AS SELECT * FROM PUBLIC.ORDERS
description: basic view with CREATE OR ALTER

sql: CREATE OR REPLACE TABLE PUBLIC.BAD (id INT)
description: table with CREATE OR REPLACE triggers violation

sql: CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE PUBLIC.MY_PROC() RETURNS STRING LANGUAGE SQL AS $$ BEGIN RETURN 'ok'; END; $$
description: procedure with CREATE OR REPLACE is allowed

sql: CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION PUBLIC.MY_FN() RETURNS INT AS $$1$$
description: function with CREATE OR REPLACE is allowed
plain CREATE without OR ALTER triggers violation

sql: CREATE OR ALTER PROCEDURE PUBLIC.SP2() RETURNS STRING LANGUAGE SQL AS $$ BEGIN RETURN 'ok'; END; $$
description: procedure with CREATE OR ALTER also works
sequence is not in enforcement list

sql: CREATE OR ALTER TASK PUBLIC.MY_TASK SCHEDULE='1 MINUTE' AS SELECT 1
